name: DealCloud
description: DealCloud (by Intapp) is a deal and relationship management platform for investment banking, private equity, and corporate development, providing CRM, pipeline, and workflow APIs for integrations.

auth_methods.note: The official DealCloud REST API 'Authentication' documentation describes OAuth 2.0 flows (Authorization Code and Client Credentials), API Key authentication using the X-Api-Key header, and Personal Access Tokens used as Bearer tokens.

credential_access.note: The 'Obtain API credentials' documentation indicates credentials (API keys / OAuth client credentials / personal access tokens) are provisioned within DealCloud by an administrator (or via contacting DealCloud/Intapp support), implying non-admin users require admin/support involvement rather than fully self-serve signup.

api_surface.note: Swagger JSON at /swagger/v1/swagger.json shows a REST API (paths like /contacts, /accounts, /oauth/token) and securityDefinitions; the Swagger UI is hosted at the docs root. The API covers core objects (Contacts, Accounts, Operations) indicating broad coverage.

buildability.note: Although the REST API is publicly documented, obtaining working API credentials requires DealCloud admin provisioning and/or contacting support, so a developer cannot immediately self-serve and build without organizational approval.
